name: DeployGate
description: Japanese mobile app distribution and beta testing platform for iOS and Android with feedback collection.

seo.title: DeployGate — Release / App Store Operations
seo.meta_description: DeployGate: Japanese mobile app distribution and beta testing platform for iOS and Android with feedback collection.

when_to_use: iOS/Android beta distribution to testers with crash feedback collection
Japanese mobile app QA workflow with tester feedback and version management
OTA app distribution for internal stakeholders before App Store submission
Automated build upload and tester notification via CI/CD integration

pros: Smooth OTA install flow for iOS and Android testers
Good feedback and crash capture from testers
Strong fit for Japanese mobile teams and workflows
API integrates well with CI pipelines
cons: Global enterprise features lag Firebase or TestFlight
Pricing not always obvious outside Japan
review.verdict: Strong beta distribution tool if you work in Japan; elsewhere TestFlight plus Firebase usually wins.
review.best_for: Japanese mobile teams distributing internal betas to testers
review.not_for: Global teams already standardized on TestFlight or Firebase

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
